purpose: L4 guard arm baseline backfill (spec 2026-06-11-l4-guard-arm §8 prerequisite): seer-survival metric family back-computed on existing b4/b1 raw games before running l4_guard

cross_validation.night_split_note: seer_night_death_rate=0.325 (13/40) is DEATH-based and internally consistent (13 night + 20 vote = 33 = seer_death_rate*40). Measured on the same 40 valid games: 21 games had a night-kill attempt on the seer, 14 had a witch save on the seer, 13 night deaths landed. The b4 verdict's wording '被夜刀 15 + 被票 20' does not sum to its own 33 and matches none of these measured counts exactly — treat THIS snapshot's death-based family as the canonical baseline for the l4_guard comparison; the verdict's 15 is a prose-level approximation.
cross_validation.b1_claim_metric_null: expected — b1 (prompt_v2) has no scribe artifacts, so seer_claim_* is null there; b4 is the primary baseline for the claim-survival metric.
